message:
fix: add rate limit retry logic to Auto-QA workflow (#8794)

The Auto-QA workflow was crashing when GitHub API rate limits were
exceeded (403 with x-ratelimit-remaining: 0) because all API calls
had no retry logic. Add a withRetry() helper that detects rate limit
errors (403/429), reads the x-ratelimit-reset header, and retries
with exponential backoff (up to 3 retries, max 2 min wait).

Wraps all github.rest.issues.listForRepo and issues.create calls
in the issue creation step.

Fixes #8717

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
